success_surface: Precise range-targeted cell validation and replacement with robust data type checking
effective_behaviors: Use openpyxl for granular cell-level manipulation when working within specific worksheet ranges
Convert column letters to numeric indices programmatically for multi-column range iteration
Apply regex-based numeric validation to distinguish pure numeric values from corrupted/text data
Track modification counts and log replacement actions for auditability and debugging
Ensure output directory exists before saving modified workbooks
Process only the explicitly defined target range to preserve unrelated cell contents
Preserve original input file by writing modifications to a separate output path
evidence: Agent used load_workbook from openpyxl instead of pandas-only approach, enabling cell.value access
Created col_to_num() helper function to map U:AI columns to numeric indices (21-35)
Applied regex r'^-?\\d+(\\.\\d+)?$' to validate numeric-only content before replacement
Logged each replacement action with cell coordinate and old value for verification
Iterated specifically through rows 3-20 and columns U-AI, not entire sheet
Saved to /outputs/multi_row_react_exec.../output.xlsx rather than overwriting source

memory_items.title: Programmatic Range Mapping
memory_items.lesson: When targets span multiple columns with letters beyond Z (AA, AB, AI, etc.), implement a dynamic column letter-to-number conversion function.
memory_items.generalization: Build reusable helpers that translate A1 notation into array indices for precise range traversal.

memory_items.title: Defensive Numeric Validation
memory_items.lesson: Validate cell contents against strict numeric patterns before treating them as numbers, catching both text-encoded values and corrupted data.
memory_items.generalization: Use regex combined with type conversion attempts to distinguish valid numbers from edge cases like '#VALUE!' or embedded symbols.

memory_items.title: Modification Audit Trail
memory_items.lesson: Count and log every cell change during batch operations to enable verification and error diagnosis.
memory_items.generalization: Maintain counters for processed, replaced, and skipped cells; report totals at execution end.

memory_items.title: Targeted Range Execution
memory_items.lesson: Process only the explicitly specified cell range to avoid unintended side effects on surrounding data.
memory_items.generalization: Bound all loops to task-defined boundaries; never iterate over entire worksheets unless required.

edits.content:
## 6. Advanced Range Operations
- **Multi-Column Iteration**: For ranges spanning columns beyond Z (e.g., AA, AI), implement a helper function to convert column letters to numeric indices dynamically.
- **Numeric Validation**: Before modifying cell values, apply strict regex patterns to confirm numeric purity (integers, decimals, negatives) and reject text-embedded or formula errors.
- **Audit Logging**: Maintain counters for total cells processed, replaced, and skipped; report modification summaries upon completion for traceability.
- **Output Safety**: Always ensure the output directory exists (`os.makedirs` with `exist_ok=True`) before saving; never overwrite the source file unless explicitly directed.
- **Boundary Discipline**: Confine all iterations to the explicitly defined target range (start/end row and column); do not process beyond task specifications.
